titleStmt.title: SII 26.138: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 138. (A.R. No. 130 of 1909.) KOMARALIṄGAM, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south base of the Karivaradarāja-perumāḷ temple.

This incomplete inscription records an order of the king addressed to the Nagara-dāsa of Vaṉkurugūr granting lands in Paṟutikulach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam situated to the east of the tank at Koḻumam in Karaivaḻi-nāḍu for maintaining a flower-garden named after the king dedicated by Jananāthabrahmādhirāyan to the god Vēdanāyaka-perumāḷ, for the merit of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ vaṉkurukūr nakaradāsaṉukku nam Olai kuṭuttapaṭiyāvatu jaṉanātabrahmādhirāyan namperāl namakku naṉṟāka vetanāyakap perumāḷukkuttā cai ceyvikka tirunantavaṉattukku jīvaṉattukku viṭṭa nilamāvatu karaivaḻināṭṭuk koḻumattukkuk kuḷakkiḻ parutikula
ccaturvvedimaṅkalattuc cokkaṉ makan tiruvaraṅkaṉ Avaṉṉilam nammutāṉamaiyil vitainilattukkum Ellaiyāvatu keraḷakesarippererikku meṟku Atirādhirāja Īśvaramuṭaiyār nimantappuṟattukku vaṭakkum Idevar nimantappuṟattukkut teṟkum Ivvellaikkuḷpaṭṭa vitaik kuṟuṇiyum virāṇap
pallavaraiyaṉ maṉṟāṭṭu nilattukku meṟkum vaṭakkum tunappiḷḷai nilat tukkuk kiḻakkum Atirādhirājaīśvarammuṭaiyār kāppuṟattukkut teṟkum Ivvellaikkuḷpaṭṭa vitai mukkuṟuṇiyum virāṇappallavaraiyaṉ nilattukku meUnfinished.
Digital edition of SII 26.138 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
